## Setup experience

How was getting evalcraft installed and running? Any friction points?

## First cassette

Describe the first cassette you recorded. What agent/framework did you use?

## What confused you?

Anything in the docs, API, or CLI that was unclear or unexpected?

## What's missing?

Features, integrations, or docs you wished existed.

## Would you recommend?

Would you recommend evalcraft to a colleague building AI agents? Why or why not?
